features.heading: Every Checkpoint
features.description: Treasure Hunt turns your venue into an interactive game. Attendees explore, scan, earn, and compete — all from the phone browser, no app required.

items.title: Guide Foot Traffic
items.description: Place checkpoints at sponsor booths, undervisited areas, or anywhere you want attendees to go. Each one is a reason to walk across the venue.

items.title: Reward Real Participation
items.description: Attendees earn points for engaging — not just showing up. Points convert to real merch in the built-in store: hats, socks, and exclusive items.

items.title: Zero Friction Setup
items.description: Drop NFC tags or QR codes anywhere. Attendees open the URL, tap to sign in, and start playing in 30 seconds. No app download.

items.title: The Game Grows With Your Crowd
items.description: Attendees and sponsors can hide their own NFC checkpoints. The more people play, the bigger the game gets — engagement compounds on itself.

items.title: Amplify Your Social Reach
items.description: Reward attendees for following your social channels and sharing their progress. Turn in-person engagement into online visibility.

items.title: Track Everything in Real Time
items.description: See which areas are hot, which are cold, and who your most engaged attendees are. Give sponsors proof their booth got traffic.

howItWorks.heading: Five Steps.
howItWorks.callout: You place the checkpoints. You set the rewards. We handle everything else.
howItWorks.infraDescription: Behind every scan and reward is infrastructure built for speed and transparency. Your attendees never see the complexity — they just play.

steps.title: Open and Play Instantly
steps.description: Attendees visit a URL on their phone and sign in with one tap. No app download, no account setup. They're playing in 30 seconds.

steps.title: Explore the Venue
steps.description: Checkpoints are placed where you want traffic. Attendees follow the map, discover hidden spots, and uncover rewards across your space.

steps.title: Scan to Earn
steps.description: One tap on an NFC tag or scan of a QR code. Instant reward, automatically tracked. Every interaction becomes a data point for you.

steps.title: Compete and Collaborate
steps.description: Live leaderboards fuel friendly competition. Social challenges and team missions keep energy high throughout the event.

steps.title: Spend Real Rewards
steps.description: Points unlock real merchandise — hats, socks, exclusive items. Attendees leave with something tangible from your event.

infraItems.title: Built for Speed
infraItems.description: Every scan, reward, and purchase processes instantly on dedicated infrastructure. No loading screens, no lag.

infraItems.title: Zero Cost to Attendees
infraItems.description: Attendees collect rewards, shop the merch store, and climb leaderboards without paying anything. All transaction costs are covered.

infraItems.title: One-Tap Sign-In
infraItems.description: No passwords, no account creation, no friction. Attendees tap once and they're in.

infraItems.title: Fully Transparent & Auditable
infraItems.description: Every reward, checkpoint scan, and purchase is recorded and verifiable. Give sponsors engagement data they can trust.

useCases.heading: Built for
useCases.description: From 50-person meetups to 10,000-seat arenas. Treasure Hunt scales to your event and your goals.

items.title: Conferences & Summits
items.description: Turn passive attendees into active explorers. Drive traffic to sponsor booths, fill dead zones between sessions, and give organizers hard data on what worked.

items.title: Corporate Events
items.description: Gamify product launches, team offsites, and internal summits. Give every attendee a reason to explore the space and interact with every activation.

items.title: Universities & Campuses
items.description: Orientation weeks, open days, and campus tours that students actually enjoy. They explore, compete, and discover spaces they'd skip otherwise.

items.title: Festivals & Expos
items.description: Layer exploration across massive venues. Reward attendees for visiting stages, sponsor areas, and hidden experiences — and track it all in real time.

items.title: Brand Activations
items.description: Connect physical marketing to measurable results. Know exactly which touchpoints drove interaction, how long people stayed, and what they engaged with.

items.title: Hackathons
items.description: Keep builders moving between coding sessions. Reward participation at workshops, sponsor booths, and social areas with merch they actually want.

items.quote: Seriously!! The treasure hunt was a HUGE SUCCESS! You guys played a big role in creating the ETH Denver experience! Well done!
items.author: Nick

items.quote: My booth was tucked in a back corner, I barely had anyone stopping by. Then Treasure Hunt hid a checkpoint at my spot and suddenly people kept showing up. They'd scan the tag, see my custom kicks, and start buying. That one checkpoint completely turned my weekend around.
items.author: Custom Sneaker Vendor

items.quote: No app download, no complicated setup. Players were scanning checkpoints within 30 seconds of signing in. The merch store was a huge hit.
items.author: NOVA Blockchain Lab

items.question: How long does it take to set up?
items.answer: As fast as 48 hours. We handle the tech — you tell us where the checkpoints go and what rewards to offer.

items.question: Do attendees need to download an app?
items.answer: No. It runs entirely in the phone browser. One tap to sign in, playing in under 30 seconds.

items.question: What if our venue doesn't have NFC?
items.answer: QR codes work everywhere. You can mix NFC and QR across your venue, or go QR-only.

items.question: Can we customize the branding?
items.answer: Yes. Pro and Enterprise packages include custom checkpoint design, reward names, and white-label branding.

items.question: What data do organizers get?
items.answer: A real-time dashboard with checkpoint visits, engagement heatmaps, leaderboard standings, and a full post-event analytics report to share with sponsors.

items.question: Is there a minimum event size?
items.answer: Starter is free for events up to 100 attendees. Pro covers up to 1,000, and Enterprise handles everything above that with dedicated support.

items.question: How does pricing work?
items.answer: Treasure Hunt is priced per event, based on your expected attendee count. Starter is free for small events. Pro starts at €990/event for up to 300 attendees, scaling to €1,990 for up to 1,000. Enterprise starts at €4,990/event for 1,000+ attendees.

items.question: Is there a money-back guarantee?
items.answer: Yes. If you're not satisfied with the platform before your event starts, we'll refund your payment in full.

items.question: Do you offer discounts for multiple events?
items.answer: Yes. Organizations running 3 or more events per year receive a 20% discount. Contact us for multi-event pricing.

items.question: What if my event grows beyond my tier?
items.answer: No problem. You can upgrade your plan at any time before or during the event. You only pay the difference.
